Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 119ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
44ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 42ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.375,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.375,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Validation fails when platform username is empty

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:

Info 

Setup:

        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 18ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

Request:

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 17ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO013 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO013 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 304ms 4 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
96ms 7 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 18ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.375
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        30.375

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.375
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        30.375
    After:
        30.375

Setup:

When APISYS requests payment with: 13ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 5
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "f4c32196-60ff-4c2a-9377-fb30c4bcdfb7",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": 5
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

        }

          "status": 400,

                "key": "amount",

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement credits the wallet
21ms 2 2 2

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

                "CNY": 30.375
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "073d8f8d-5ac5-4d08-b588-db346a9ce3ae",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in

        {
          "transfer_no": "f9fa8000-3cde-422c-94d5-e95c6cd87020",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

          "amount": "50",

          "body": {
            "code": 200,

reference_id <amo010_reference_id>
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged 19ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 14ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "57682413-f046-41aa-8692-7ced394ee887",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "9ff5633a-9cc9-43ce-ac6f-d0b6acab7b76"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "cd9d107a-444b-4ada-b14a-b056770a71b3",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5441dcc0-4a68-4976-9352-3d2a255a2ff3",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO010 response should fail validation < 1ms Show Error +

        {
          "transfer_no": "cd9d107a-444b-4ada-b14a-b056770a71b3",

          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10"
        }
    response:

          "status": 200,
          "body": {

            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5441dcc0-4a68-4976-9352-3d2a255a2ff3",

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 496ms 6 3 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
98ms 6 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 20ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.5

Info

    Response:

            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 58ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "b97bf47f-0890-49d7-9cf8-aa6d6b6beeb6",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "2ef5daca-de08-42cc-a54d-f3317b280852"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5977d03c-8ef4-40f7-a906-e411d24560ae",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "b97bf47f-0890-49d7-9cf8-aa6d6b6beeb6",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "2ef5daca-de08-42cc-a54d-f3317b280852"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5977d03c-8ef4-40f7-a906-e411d24560ae",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should decrease by 20.5$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Repeating the same transfer_no is idempotent

field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "59e5c8f6-d234-4290-b0ca-c15c300a750e",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "89ac43f9-b083-4c9b-b813-aec62d2ae62e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "820c2295-03ac-4a62-bb38-cbfdf0d4d960",

              "status": 1

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should decrease by 15$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <amo011_reference_id>
amount -15
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged < 1ms

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "337b9283-9e0a-49ea-a7ab-8191739ac1c3",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "791058f0-156b-430d-a664-cde2537dfd7a"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "30086a47-9ba0-4dcb-b365-5e44059e363e",
              "amount": -140,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 14ms Show Error +

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount precision is invalid
13ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 12ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "9a8d7230-7fca-4226-ab71-dd13fb9349bd",
          "game_type": "",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "9484cad1-8185-48e4-91c5-3ce9d8dfa64a"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out

 ScenarioError: Expected AMO011 response to fail validation
 Context:
    request:
        {

        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transfer_no <transfer_no>
currency <currency>
amount 25 

Then(/^a successful transfer in exists for:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests cancel transfer with: < 1ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no> 

Then(/^APISYS requests cancel transfer with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO014 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO014 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "cancel_reference_id" < 1ms

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 7 4

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 120.5

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 120.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 120.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success
amount 120

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 0.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 0.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
0.5 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer lifecycle through merchant wallet APIs < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify transfer credit, debit, reversal, and balance retrieval end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 100, get balance, transfer out 35, get balance, cancel transfer, get balance
< 1ms 14 8

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 100

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 100 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 100$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

platform_username
currencies <currency>
